inputs.label: Parent Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: Total adjusted gross income of both parents (if married) or single parent

businessContext_i18n.en: Total adjusted gross income of both parents (if married) or single parent
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her iki ebeveynin (evliyse) veya tek ebeveynin toplam düzeltilmiş brüt geliri
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes bereinigtes Bruttoeinkommen beider Eltern (bei Verheirateten) oder eines Elternteils
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu brut total ajusté des deux parents (si mariés) ou du parent seul
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso bruto total ajustado de ambos padres (si están casados) o del padre soltero

inputs.label: Student Annual Income
inputs.businessContext: Student's adjusted gross income from work

businessContext_i18n.en: Student's adjusted gross income from work
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğrencinin işten elde ettiği düzeltilmiş brüt gelir
businessContext_i18n.de: Bereinigtes Bruttoeinkommen des Studenten aus Arbeit
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu brut ajusté de l'étudiant provenant du travail
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso bruto ajustado del estudiante por trabajo

inputs.label: Parent Assets
inputs.businessContext: Total non-retirement assets of parents (cash, investments, real estate other than primary home)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total non-retirement assets of parents (cash, investments, real estate other than primary home)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ebeveynlerin emeklilik dışı toplam varlıkları (nakit, yatırımlar, birincil konut dışındaki gayrimenkuller)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes nicht altersvorsorgegebundenes Vermögen der Eltern (Bargeld, Investitionen, Immobilien außer dem Eigenheim)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des actifs non-retraite des parents (liquidités, investissements, biens immobiliers autres que la résidence principale)
businessContext_i18n.es: Activos no jubilatorios totales de los padres (efectivo, inversiones, bienes raíces distintos de la vivienda principal)

inputs.label: Student Assets
inputs.businessContext: Student's total cash, savings, and other assets

businessContext_i18n.en: Student's total cash, savings, and other assets
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğrencinin toplam nakit, tasarruf ve diğer varlıkları
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes Bargeld, Ersparnisse und sonstige Vermögenswerte des Studenten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des liquidités, économies et autres actifs de l'étudiant
businessContext_i18n.es: Efectivo, ahorros y otros activos totales del estudiante

inputs.label: Number in College
inputs.businessContext: Number of household members attending college in the academic year

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of household members attending college in the academic year
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akademik yılda üniversiteye devam eden hane halkı üyesi sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Haushaltsmitglieder, die im akademischen Jahr ein College besuchen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de membres du ménage fréquentant l'université dans l'année académique
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de miembros del hogar que asisten a la universidad en el año académico
